Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Nila]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Nila is Benri Vallenar's personal attendant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Nila is a human woman with black hair and glasses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Nila is recording the meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Nila is inspecting a ship's autopilot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Nila works for Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Nila was promised a position in the Vallenar Corporation for reporting on Benri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Nila has a son.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Benri received a recording of a conversation with Nila.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Nila is a Solstice agent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Nila wears a Vallenar Corporation uniform.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
